raw_consumer_statement:
Saw a charge on my card i did not recognize.

Called immediately. They said they would start a fraud claim but heard nothing.

Now it was closed in the merchants favor.

I have never done business with this merchant and my card was used without my permission. I did not benefit from whatever was purchased.

My card should have been canceled immediatley but I can't tell Citi how to do their business.

Now i would like this reopened as fraud, Who ordered this?

Who signed for it?

This charge needs to be reversed asap.

Dispute Details Case ID XXXX Reason for Dispute Unrecognized charge Card Details Card ending in - XXXX Credit Status {$100.00}
